subcodes.first_line: Some time ago the Most Holy, Most Exalted Tablet was sent. God willing, thou wilt attain unto it and perceive the fragrance of the All-Merciful's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چندی قبل لوح امنع اقدس ارسال شد انشاء الله بان فائز شوی و عرف عنایت رحمن را
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat]
